data.description:
## Summary
`make lint` (ruff==0.15.19, the pinned CI/hook version) FAILS on `main`: src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py has an F811 — `impact` is imported as a re-export from review_kernel.decide (line ~54, in a `# noqa: F401` block) AND reused as a nested pydantic Field name `impact` (line ~96). ruff flags the second as a redefinition of the (re-export) first. Because CI runs the identical pinned ruff, the Verified gate fails on ANY change based on current main -> NOTHING can land.

## How it slipped through (root-cause hypothesis)
Classic MERGE SKEW: the `impact` re-export import landed via 2c93aa3d6 (epic 66ac Pass-3 floor) while the Field named `impact` pre-existed (or vice versa) — each change was green against its OWN change-ref, but the MERGED main is red. CI validates GERRIT_REFSPEC (the per-change patchset), not the post-merge tree, so a name-collision across two independently-green changes is invisible until merged. (Alternative: a ruff-version pin bump exposed a latent shadow.) This is the same semantic-merge-conflict failure mode epic 88ab's two-vote gate + S5 scenario 6 exist to surface.

## Reproduction
1. git checkout origin/main
2. make lint  ->  F811 at src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py:96 ("redefinition of unused 'impact'")  -> exit 1

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: make lint green on main; a name-collision merge skew is caught BEFORE it lands (post-merge validation).
- Actual: main is lint-red; the collision landed and blocks all subsequent changes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] make lint passes on main again (immediate fix: a targeted # noqa: F811 on the nested Field, OR de-shadow the name — the two are genuinely different objects across scopes)
- [ ] Root-cause the escape: confirm merge-skew vs ruff-pin bump; if merge-skew, note the gap (per-change-ref CI does not validate the merge result) as evidence for the epic-88ab merge-review / post-merge-CI value
- [ ] (follow-up, if merge-skew) a guard so a name-collision merge skew is caught: e.g. CI on the merge tree, or the 88ab merge-change review path applied to submits
data.title: main is lint-red: F811 redefinition of 'impact' in plan_review/passes.py (merge-skew / ruff-pin exposure blocking all landings)
